titleStmt.title: SII 20.26: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 26. (B.K. No. 92 of 1936-37.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab No. 47 in the Archaeological Museum.

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 962 Vikrama, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti corresponding to A.D. 1040, December 24 which was Wednesday.

It registers gift of land, house-site, oil-mill and garden to God Mūlasthāna-Mahādēva at Benakanakaviṭṭage situated near Sindige-12 which was a Kaṁpaṇa, by Perggaḍe Mēlayya, in the presence of Manneya Nāyimarasa and Mahāsāmanta Mūkarasa. The latter, who is styled Banavāsipuravarēśvara, is stated to have been administering the mēlāḷke of Pagariṭe-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhi
rājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōtta
rābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkatāraṁ saluttamire . samadhigatapa
ñcamahāśabda mahāsāmanta banavāsipuravarēśvaraṁ
nankakāṟaṁ gaṇḍabhairavanāmādi kāsamētaṁ śrīmanmahāsāmantaṁ
mūkarasarppagariṭināḍa mēlāḷkeyaṁ duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipāḷana
dindamāḷuttire kaṁpaṇa sindige 12 ra baḷiya benakanakaviṭṭa
geya mūlasthānada mahādēvargge samadhigatapañca mahā
śabda mahāsāmanta vijayalakṣmīkānta ra narivadhare
yaporeva candana caṁdra pagevarāditya nāmādi
samastapraśastisahita śrīmanmanneya nāyimarasa
nuṁ mūkarasanumiḻdu sakavarṣa 962 neya
vikramasaṁvatsaraduttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntiyoḷ
parvvanimittaṁvāge Alliya gāvuṇḍaṁ perggaḍe mēlayyaṁ
dhārāpūrvvakaṁ sarvvanamasyamāgire paḍedu dēvargge
biṭṭa keyyariya nela matta 50 manneya nivē
śana 8 nandādīvigege soḍareṇṇege ghāṇa 1
māle pūvige tōṭa 1 Ī dharmmamanārō
rvvaru rakṣisidaravargge dharmmanapēkṣisida
varggegaṁgeyoḷ bāṇarāsiyoḷ kavileyuṁ
brāhmaṇarumaṁ liṅgagaḷumenadaḻida dōṣa
makku . Anteyalte dharmmaśāstra . bahubhi
rvvasudhā dattā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ
yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya ta
dā phaḷaṁ . © maṁgaḷa mahāśrī
Digital edition of SII 20.26 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
